entities.name: Lamyhara

attributes.role: omnipotens, misericors Pater, omnium creatur[urarum] ordinator, iuste iudex, eterne rex regum et Domine dominancium

entities.raw_quote: Lamyhara, omnipotens, misericors Pater, omnium creaturarum ordinator, [iuste] iudex, eterne rex regum et Domine dominancium

entities.name: Hocleiste

attributes.role: holy God, blessed Father and imperishable evidence of the heart

entities.raw_quote: Hocleiste, O holy God, blessed Father and imperishable evidence of the heart

entities.name: Hamphynethon

attributes.role: most merciful creator, inspirer and reformer of all corrupted souls

entities.raw_quote: Hamphynethon, Heloy, most merciful creator, inspirer and reformer of all corrupted souls

entities.name: Hanazay

attributes.description: A sequence of names/voces magicae used in prayer

entities.raw_quote: Hanazay. zarahoron. hubisenaar. ghu. hirbaionay. gynbar. zanailc. selchora. zelmora. hiramay. iethohal. ylaramel. hamatha. mathois. iaboha.

entities.name: Ianemyer

attributes.role: unus, magnus, mirabilis, eterne Deus, angel of eternal council

entities.raw_quote: Ianemyer, unus, magnus, mirabilis, eterne Deus, eterni consilii angelus

entities.name: Hadyon

attributes.role: illustrious with eternal harmony of all powers, rulers, and courts

entities.raw_quote: Hadyon, usyon, omnium potestatum atque regnorum et iudiciorum eterna conspicazione conspicuus

entities.name: Hely

attributes.role: mighty, master of angels and archangels

entities.raw_quote: Hely, reverende, potens et dominans superioribus angelis et archangelis omnibusque celestibus creaturis

entities.name: Horlon

attributes.role: God who ordered all things in number, weight, and measure

entities.raw_quote: Horlon, Deus, qui omnia numero, pondere et mensura fecisti

entities.name: Porrenthimon

attributes.role: mediator of all operations and creatures

entities.raw_quote: Porrenthimon, mediator omnium operacionum et creaturarum

entities.name: Gofgameli

attributes.role: God of all wisdom and giver of this science

entities.raw_quote: Gofgameli, omnis sapiencie Deus et sciencie donator illis

entities.name: Emanuel

attributes.role: king of kings, God, substance, salvation and revelation

entities.raw_quote: Emanuel, adoro te, rex regum et Deus meus et substancia mea, salus et revelacio mea

entities.name: Hon. ezethomos sequence

attributes.description: A series of names used in Prayer 16

entities.raw_quote: {H}on. ezethomos. iezemonos. hazalathon. azaithon. hentynethel. hezemtynethel.

entities.name: Admyhel
entities.raw_quote: Admyhel, Domine, Deus, sancte Pater omnipotens

entities.name: Honzmorb sequence

attributes.description: A series of names used in Prayer 18

entities.raw_quote: Honzmorb. lemogethon. hegemothon. hazathay. hazathar. hazamathar.

summary: This chunk contains a collection of liturgical prayers (numbered LVII to LXXVI) from the Liber Juratus. These prayers utilize various divine names, angelic hierarchies, and 'voces magicae' (magical names) to petition God for spiritual vision, purification, wisdom, and the effectiveness of the 'art'.
key_passages: Lamyhara, omnipotens, misericors Pater, omnium creaturarum ordinator
grant unto me those things which I desire and I believe, the glory and grace of this vision
adorn my intelligence this day, and multiply in me a penitent and clarifying reasoning
God, who ordered all things in number, weight, and measure
through the power of this sacrament, inspire my heart and pour into it the dew of your grace
